summary: Excellent audience recording captures a superb Dead show with high‑quality sound.
review: Reviewers rave that this audience (AUD) tape is of really good quality, making the listening experience pleasant and clear. The concert itself is described as an excellent performance, though no specific songs or moments are singled out in the comments.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review praises both the show and the audience recording as very good, indicating a strong overall impression but limited data for high confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the AUD source is of really good quality—clear enough to be enjoyable despite being an audience capture.
